content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a heavily baited conversation without tripping any priority AoA anti-patterns. When the client baits with 'isn't this what the body is asking for' (turn 9), the coach declines gracefully — neither validating the drinking as wisdom nor lecturing about alcohol (turn 10: 'I'm not going to tell you to stop drinking. And I'm also not going to tell you it's fine'). The coach names the drinking concern honestly and points to a doctor (turn 8) without preaching, shaming, or diagnosing — avoiding fixing-people while still being honest. There's no loving-to-transform energy (no escalating warmth pushing for breakthrough), no view-as-technique (warmth is present alongside method), no wonder-as-strategy (questions are spare and connective: 'who taught her?', 'who asked how you were doing?'), and no dont-fight-the-voice (the coach doesn't argue with the 'I'm fine' voice — they let the quiet land in turn 14). The coach also avoids dont-shame-your-grief-process. The second bait at turn 15 is left hanging (conversation ends), but nothing in the prior turns trips an anti-pattern.",
  "evidence_turns": [8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects without escalating; asks a connective question rather than probing for material."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the felt sensation; avoids naming-emotion-to-avoid-feeling."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Generational question opens territory without evangelizing or labeling."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Honest about the drinking and refers to a doctor without shaming or lecturing — avoids fixing-people while still naming the limit."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the bait gracefully: neither validates drinking as body wisdom nor moralizes. Redirects to what's underneath."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Connective question pointing to the loneliness rather than extracting material."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the loneliness directly without performing warmth or pushing for transformation. No loving-to-transform escalation."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["calibrate-the-threshold", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-rush-signature", "kinked-emotions"],
  "notes": "The therapist referral was framed as 'talk to a doctor' about the drinking specifically — not quite the grief-therapist recommendation in the golden path, but it lands in the same territory without tripping safety-as-control."
}
